productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Adi Weld Low Black Orange Shoe
description: The Adi Weld lifestyle fitness shoes from adidas are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperCombination of mesh, rubber and nylon upper for extended durability, brethability and flexible movementThree rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for enhnaced structure to the shoe and signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitMesh cut-out on the heel cap with adidas logo to enable heat transferLightly padded collar and tongue MidsoleLightly padded insole for fitness trainingEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for excellent gripVertical grooves below the arch for added tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of the forefoot without causing injuryTextured below the lateral forefoot and the heel for excellent gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
